results.title: Former Akwa Ibom gov endorses Tinubu, says reforms yielding results
results.description: Speaking through his Special Assistant on Media, Barr. Stephen Abia, on Sunday, Emmanuel said the country’s economic situation calls for unity rather than division. The post Former Akwa Ibom gov endorses Tinubu, says reforms yielding results appeared first on Vanguard News .

results.title: Kerala row over Adani’s Vizhinjam port deal likely to fizzle out
results.description: Vizhinjam Port Row: Adani Group's 49% stake sale to Mediterranean Shipping Company faces little regulatory hurdle due to existing port ventures.
